name: Quiver Spare Propeller (XRotor MFP 2480)
shortDescription: Genuine Hobbywing XRotor MFP 2480 replacement propeller for the Quiver DevKit, available in CW and CCW.

included.label: Hobbywing XRotor MFP 2480 propeller
included.notes: Specify CW or CCW (and how many of each) in the order notes at checkout.

standards.label: Quiver Manufacturing Guide
standards.description: Reference standard until a dedicated spare-parts standard exists.

checkout.customerNotice: Matches Hobbywing retail pricing. Shares a checkout with the Quiver DevKit, so spares can ship in the same order.

offers.notes: Pass-through retail part sold at Hobbywing list price; no DAO fee is proposed on pass-through parts.
